signals.summary: USFDA Form 483 with 7 observations at Eugia Unit II signals potential regulatory compliance issues that may delay approvals or impact operations.

affected_thesis_drivers: Regulatory risks at key facilities threatening approvals
impacts.what_to_watch: Eugia Unit II's official FDA classification (OAI, VAI, or NAI)

triage_result: Initial triage indicates strong revenue stability with minor margin pressures due to raw material costs. Core US generics business is tracking well.

forensic_scorecard.evasion_log: Management addressed all major questions directly. No significant dodging on US FDA warning letters or pricing pressure.
critical_alerts: Minor capitalization of R&D expenses noted, within industry norms.
